mapper.sql: id, name, address, lat, lng, description, phone, website, thumbnail_url, business_hours, region_code, rating_avg, rating_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM gyms WHERE id = #{gymId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE gyms SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{gymId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE gyms SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng}, description = #{description}, phone = #{phone}, website = #{website}, business_hours = #{businessHours}::jsonb, region_code = #{regionCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{gymId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE gym_grades SET is_active = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND is_active = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gym_grades (gym_id, label, difficulty_order, is_active) VALUES (#{gymId}, #{label}, #{difficultyOrder}, TRUE) ON CONFLICT (gym_id, label) DO UPDATE SET difficulty_order = EXCLUDED.difficulty_order, is_active = TRUE, updated_at = NOW()
